summary: DHH announces he ordered a Mac Mini to build a DIY PVR (personal video recorder) since TiVo isn't available in Denmark. He plans to combine it with an EyeTV 200, an external firewire drive, and wireless connectivity to create a home media setup. The post is a brief, enthusiastic gadget diary entry from early 2005, reflecting his Apple fandom and tinkerer spirit.
key_points: DHH is using the Mac Mini as the basis for a homemade PVR to replace unavailable TiVo in Denmark
The setup combines Mac Mini, EyeTV 200, external firewire storage, Airport Extreme WiFi, and Bluetooth phone control
He frames the project as building something 'even better' than TiVo out of necessity
money_quotes: I needed a good excuse (or any excuse, really) to get a Mac Mini.
Since Tivo won't come to us Danes, we'll build something even better ourselves.
Can't wait to stop complaining about how we got 40 channels with nothing on.
key_insight: A lighthearted gadget post about building a DIY PVR with a Mac Mini, notable mainly as a time capsule of mid-2000s Apple enthusiasm and home media tinkering.
